'''ladama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatolysis|pneumatolysis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatolysis|pneumatolysis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædæmæth|lædæmæth]] || [[word:lædæmæj|lædæmæj]] || [[word:lædæmæsh|lædæmæsh]] || [[word:lædæmæ|lædæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladadamath|ladadamath]] || [[word:ladadamaj|ladadamaj]] || [[word:ladadamash|ladadamash]] || [[word:ladadama|ladadama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladamath|ladamath]] || [[word:ladamaj|ladamaj]] || [[word:ladamash|ladamash]] || [[word:ladama|ladama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladafmath|ladafmath]] || [[word:ladafmaj|ladafmaj]] || [[word:ladafmash|ladafmash]] || [[word:ladafmaf|ladafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladamatha|ladamatha]] || [[word:ladamaja|ladamaja]] || [[word:ladamasha|ladamasha]] || [[word:ladamaka|ladamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladamath|ladamath]] || [[word:ladamaj|ladamaj]] || [[word:ladamash|ladamash]] || [[word:ladama|ladama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladamathal|ladamathal]] || [[word:ladamajal|ladamajal]] || [[word:ladamashal|ladamashal]] || [[word:ladamakal|ladamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladamathatha|ladamathatha]] || [[word:ladamajaja|ladamajaja]] || [[word:ladamashasha|ladamashasha]] || [[word:ladamaka|ladamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladamathan|ladamathan]] || [[word:ladamajan|ladamajan]] || [[word:ladamashan|ladamashan]] || [[word:ladamakan|ladamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladamathaoro|ladamathaoro]] || [[word:ladamajaoro|ladamajaoro]] || [[word:ladamashaoro|ladamashaoro]] || [[word:ladamakaoro|ladamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
